name: ai-action-tracker-mcp
description: Hello-world MCP server scaffold (stdio + Streamable HTTP).

scripts.build:plugin: npm run build && rm -rf plugins/ai-action-tracker/dist && mkdir -p plugins/ai-action-tracker/dist plugins/ai-action-tracker/dist/hooks plugins/ai-action-tracker/hooks && cp -R dist/. plugins/ai-action-tracker/dist/ && cp hooks/danger-patterns.json plugins/ai-action-tracker/dist/hooks/danger-patterns.json && cp hooks/danger-patterns.json plugins/ai-action-tracker/hooks/danger-patterns.json
